text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One lunch break, I spot a dressed-up El Condor
Pasa striking powerful poses.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hwa-taaa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! I've got my outfit on, so I'm in a
good mood!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Doin' this really makes me feel better! A-cha!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Oooh! What's this?! That outfit... Are you a hero?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: A h-hero?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No, this is just my Condor Monk outfit! I'm no
hero.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: So... it's a villain costume?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Are you talking about limpios and rudos or
something? If that's what you mean, then I want
to be un limpio de la justicia!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Although... a rudo villain is just as important for
livening up the show.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You totally get it! A good hero needs a good
villain!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! It's the passion from both good and evil
that makes for an incredible battle!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's right, that's right! Do you have a special
technique?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I learned a lot of aerial techniques
from my papa, plus the ones I came up with on my
own!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Aerial attacks! That's so cool! What kind of
villains do you fight? And who's your partner?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wow, you're really into this...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It seems like you're quite a fan! Don't worry, I'll
return your passion tenfold!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Now, how can I best convey my passion?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Yes! If you don't mind!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Has the villain made an
appearance?! Or a second hero perhaps?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Nope! Actually, my trainer here's gonna tell you
just how passionate I am!
choice_data_list: She's just as passionate as her outfit.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Nope! Actually, my trainer here's gonna tell you
just how passionate I am!
choice_data_list: She's just as passionate as her outfit.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sí! Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Er... So what should I do?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oho! Let's show off my blazing dance!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ha! Did you see that?! The ultimate technique of
the Condor Style!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
So that's the Condor monk secret technique?!
That was so flippin' cool!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You bet! But surely your praise doesn't end there!
Tell me more, haha!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! This has been so much fun! It's been so long
since I've seen such passionate techniques!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Let's talk again soon!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Gladly! Anytime!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like El Condor Pasa was able to convey
her passion to Biko Pegasus.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since then, Biko Pegasus has started to send El
Condor Pasa frequent invites to see various plays
and programs regarding heroes.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's right!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: You mean like... a fiery robot?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I don't have a robot!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Oh?! So you have a secondary form?! A fiery one!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I feel like we're talking about two completely
different things...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But! I understand your passion! And I have to
match it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! Of course! What're a few misconceptions
in the face of such passion? I can't sweat the small
stuff!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I don't really get it, but what you just said was so
coooool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bing-bong, bing-bong!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Ah... lunch break is over already?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
It was so much fun talking about heroes! Let's talk
again soon! See ya!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Biko has a completely different kind of passion
than I do.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I can't lose to her, though!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa seems to have a reignited sense
of determination from her talk with Biko Pegasus.
